role: Root configuration and state management directory for the ArchSpine mirror system.
responsibility: Collectively defines system settings (scanning, hooks, LLM providers), file extension language support, synchronization health and sync-state snapshots, architectural rule enforcement (layer isolation, documentation standards), and runtime execution records (pipeline stages, file processing, hook behavior) to enable mirroring and maintain architectural integrity.
